evidence.value: paralleled randomized single-blinded controlled clinical trial
evidence.quote: The present study is a paralleled randomized single-blinded controlled clinical trial
In this study, 106 term neonates were admitted

evidence.value: 3 to 7 days of age, 2500 to 4000 grams birth weight, exclusive breastfeeding, 38 to 42 weeks of gestation, 14–20 mg/dL total serum bilirubin (TSB), and less than 1.5 mg/dL direct bilirubin.
evidence.quote: The inclusion criteria were 3 to 7 days of age, 2500 to 4000 grams birth weight, exclusive breastfeeding, 38 to 42 weeks of gestation, 14–20 mg/dL total serum bilirubin (TSB), and less than 1.5 mg/dL direct bilirubin.
Eligible patients were randomly allocated by randomized blocking (or grouping). The following website “https://www.sealedenvelope.com” was used by a third party to produce the randomized list.
Parents/guardians were blinded to the groups enrolled.
The clinical trial was registered in the Iranian registry of clinical trials (Number: IRCT20210201050199N1, Date: 2021-04-03).

evidence.value: change of TSB level from baseline
evidence.quote: We considered the change of TSB level from baseline as the primary outcome
The intervention group received 10 mg/kg/day oral UDCA divided into two doses plus phototherapy
106 were enrolled in two groups of 53 neonates

evidence.value: 10 mg/kg/day oral UDCA divided into two doses plus phototherapy
evidence.quote: The intervention group received 10 mg/kg/day oral UDCA divided into two doses plus phototherapy, which was dissolved in breast milk
The control group received phototherapy alone.
106 were enrolled in two groups of 53 neonates
The control group received phototherapy alone.
Bilirubin at the discharge (mg/dl) SD ± mean 7.74±1.39
Bilirubin at the discharge (mg/dl) SD ± mean 8.67±1.35
No side effects including nausea, vomiting, constipation, bloating, and skin rash were observed in the two groups.
No side effects including nausea, vomiting, constipation, bloating, and skin rash were observed in the two groups.
Bilirubin at the discharge (mg/dl) SD ± mean 7.74±1.39 8.67±1.35 <0.001
